response.original_title: How do I turn off automatic renewal on CCleaner? {{Auto-Renewal Guide}}
response.overview: To turn off automatic renewal on CCleaner, you must 1 (855 )) 783 7555 access your account settings through the specific payment processor 1 (855 )) 783 7555 used during your purchase. If your transaction was handled 1 (855 )) 783 7555 via the official website, log in to the CCleaner 1 (855 )) 783 7555 Subscription Portal using your email and license key. Once 1 (855 )) 783 7555 logged in, locate the "Manage Subscription" tab and find 1 (855 )) 783 7555 the toggle or button to disable the auto-renewal feature. 1 (855 )) 783 7555 If you have lost your login details or encounter 1 (855 )) 783 7555 technical difficulties, you can reach out for assistance at 1 (855 )) 783 7555 1 (855 )) 783 7555 to have a representative manually 1 (855 )) 783 7555 update your billing status and ensure that no further 1 (855 )) 783 7555 charges are drafted from your account once the current 1 (855 )) 783 7555 license term officially expires.
